resource_role: Public variant clinical-significance records and ClinVar metadata

evidence_boundary.can_support: Traceable ClinVar record discovery and public metadata retrieval planning.
evidence_boundary.cannot_support: Clinical diagnosis, treatment guidance, or variant pathogenicity without inspected record details and expert interpretation.
evidence_boundary.privacy_or_access: Public metadata request only. Do not submit private manuscript text, patient data, PHI, or unpublished data.
evidence_boundary.handoff: Use this packet as Reef resource evidence for Iceberg, Anchor, or Compass. Do not treat it as primary experimental validation.
